cases.input: Design a Target Operating Model for our Finance function transformation to D365 F&O. We need L1-L4 process decomposition for Record-to-Report and Procure-to-Pay.

cases.input: Produce the full TOM deliverable package for a Cyber Security function transformation: capability map diagram, maturity assessment, technology mapping, and KPI framework.
